step_rationale: Cardiac-specific E3 ligase released during myocardial necrosis.
mechanism: RNF207 is a cardiac-specific ubiquitin ligase released upon cardiomyocyte injury and necrosis in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Circulating E3 ligases are novel and sensitive biomarkers for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
